title: Vpvp
description: A New Minecraft PvP Texture Pack by Omar – Clean, Smooth, and FPS-Friendly - Guys, I need a minecraft rp developers, if you developer/designer tell me (discord username: omar9dev1)
body:
# Guys, I need a minecraft rp developers, if you developer/designer tell me (discord username: swie9dev)
## 🛡️ _**Vpvp**_ Custom PvP Texture Pack

Take your PvP to the next level with this clean, stylish, and performance-friendly texture pack. Designed specifically for competitive Minecraft players who want clarity, elegance, and smooth FPS.
## 💖 Support the Development
VPVP is 100% free, but if you want to support me and help me keep improving it, here's how you can:

🔹 **Global Support via Ko-fi:**  
[https://ko-fi.com/omardev](https://ko-fi.com/omardev)

Every donation helps me add new features, update faster, and keep VPVP the best PvP pack in the galaxy 💫

Thank you for your support! ❤️


## 🔹 Features:
💠 Custom Font – Unique and elegant typography to enhance UI readability.

- 🗡️ Refined PvP Textures – Swords, armor, GUI, particles… all optimized for PvP.

- 🖼️ Clean Blocks – Simplified and polished textures that reduce visual clutter.

- 🚀 FPS-Optimized – Lightweight assets tailored for max performance on low-end PCs.

- 🎨 Dark UI Theme – Matches modern PvP clients like Lunar & Badlion.

Whether you're on Hypixel, PvP Legacy, or your own server, this pack will give you the edge in both style and performance.

💾 Compatibility:
✅ Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.3+

✅ Works perfectly with Lunar Client, Badlion, and vanilla launchers


📦 Made by: Omar9Dev
Crafted with love, testing, and community feedback.
Enjoy it and share your clips with the pack!
